product_overview: ANTIGRAVITY is a gamified personal performance OS that computes a daily score and rank from tracked habits, visualizes progress with charts and heatmaps, and awards persistent Aura Points that can be redeemed in an in-app marketplace and compared on a leaderboard.
core_goals: Track and complete daily habits to earn score and build streaks
See a single-day and historical performance summary (score, rank, charts) to understand progress
Accumulate Aura Points and redeem them for rewards in the Aura Marketplace
Compare personal performance via a private leaderboard and view streak/multiplier progress
Inspect and manage tasks, goals, and score weightings to tune daily impact

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to create an account or sign in with email/password so they can access personalized scores, habits, Aura Points, and the marketplace.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Switch to Login mode -> Fill email and password fields -> Submit auth form -> See authenticated dashboard at /
Navigate to /auth -> Switch to Signup mode -> Fill email and password fields -> Submit signup form -> See authenticated dashboard at /
Navigate to /auth -> Switch to Signup mode -> Fill invalid email or too-short password -> Submit signup form -> See validation errors

features.name: Dashboard (Daily Overview)
features.description: Present today's score and rank, top stat cards, radar and heatmap visualizations, weekly score chart, and a view of today's permanent tasks so users can understand and act on their daily performance.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See today's score and rank summary -> Scan top stat cards for quick metrics -> Inspect radar and calendar heatmap charts for context -> Scroll to today's permanent tasks and view progress
Navigate to / -> See today's score and rank summary -> Open a task's detail overlay -> Review task metadata, score contribution, and streak

features.name: Habit Tracking
features.description: Enable users to view their active permanent daily habits, mark them complete, and observe streak and score impact for each completion.
user_flows: Authenticate via /auth -> Navigate to /habits -> See list of active habits -> Mark a habit as complete -> See habit streak update and today's score reflect the completion
Navigate to /habits -> See list of active habits -> Attempt to mark a habit complete without required input (e.g., missing numeric value) -> See validation feedback for the habit input

features.name: Aura Marketplace (Shop)
features.description: Allow users to browse rewards redeemable with Aura Points and redeem items by confirming a user-initiated redemption action.
user_flows: Authenticate via /auth -> Navigate to /shop -> View list of available rewards -> Select a reward to redeem -> Confirm redemption -> See updated Aura Points balance
Authenticate via /auth -> Navigate to /shop -> View list of available rewards -> Attempt to redeem a reward that costs more Aura Points than available -> See an insufficient-points validation message

features.name: Leaderboard & Aura History
features.description: Show the user's private leaderboard view: top three podium, self rank card with Aura Points, weekly aura summary, multiplier progress, and penalty log to track competitive and lifetime progress.
user_flows: Authenticate via /auth -> Navigate to /leaderboard -> See top three podium and self rank card with total Aura Points -> Inspect weekly Aura summary and streak multiplier progress -> Review penalty log
Authenticate via /auth -> Navigate to /leaderboard -> See self rank card -> Open Aura history timeline -> Review day-by-day earned and lost Aura Points

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and signup functionality using Supabase

features.name: Aura Marketplace (Shop)
features.description: Redeem Aura Points for rewards like Gift Cards and Subscriptions
user_interactions: Click REDEEM button on a reward
